display_name: SWING LATCH v2 (2026-07-03 serial-swinger discriminator): ride-the-streak on the SERIAL-SWINGER pond. v1 pointed at the anti-pond (age>=6h+liq25k stack = n=13, 31% serial, NET -9.98/token); discriminator study: serial swingers (>=3 winning swings, 35.4% base) are YOUNG (median 0.70h; age<=1h = 65% precision/1.8x lift) and the young cell is MEDIAN-POSITIVE: +28.2 net/token, median +18.9, 62% tokens positive, split-stable all four ways (n=37, single window). v2 = young-probe bot, age 0.1-1.5h, mcap>=100k (young admission floor), liq>=25k KEPT (fleet anti-rug floor; study wanted 10k — blocked, AxiS call; costs the sub-25k-liq serial subset). Streak rule unchanged: drop token on first losing leg, free re-entry after wins, TP +25/0.75 + TP2 +40, stop -12, ~90m timestops, velocity leg off. Young holder rug guard applies (probe bot). Judge vs badday_young_absorb AND flush at n>=30 distinct tokens scrubbed; enforce-bar per-token >=+2 over >=5 days. 2nd wave queued: range_mean_60m>=12 shadow, bounce<=5min continuation rule.
